issues.detail: The instructions do not cover error handling or edge cases.
The skill assumes a Node.js environment, limiting cross-platform applicability.

scenarios.name: init-with-dry-run
scenarios.rationale: Response B fully satisfies the rubric, while Response A uses a different framework and misses the required Commander implementation.

scenarios.name: build-with-no-minify
scenarios.rationale: Response A meets all rubric requirements, while Response B fails to use the required program name and log format.
